name: typography-blockquote
visual_summary: The typography-blockquote component is a styled blockquote element that is used to display quotes or large blocks of text in a visually appealing way, typically used in blog posts, articles, and other content-rich pages. It is often used to draw attention to important text or to highlight a quote from a notable figure. It is usually larger in size and darker in color than regular text.
generation_prompt:
